calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Edward Coughlin.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Daniel Cheung, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Land Wilson, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Edward Coughlin.
Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer was filed on June 20, 2019.
Order authorizing service of plaintiff's summons and complaint by posting (CCP Section 415.45) was filed on July 8, 2019.
Defendant Edward Coughlin filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on July 10, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on July 16, 2019, setting trial for today, August 5, 2019.
The Court makes a finding the defendant Edward Coughlin has voluntarily absented himself from today's proceedings and does not wish to contest the allegations in the complaint.
DOE defendants dismissed today, August 5, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Land Wilson, and against defendant Edward Coughlin, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $6,100.00.
Holdover Damages - $4,739.76.
Costs - $240.00.

Total - $11,079.76.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 70 Wilomt Street, San Francisco, CA 94115.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Charles Haines; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Land Wilson is present.
Attorney Daniel Chung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Edward Coughlin is present.

Parties appeared. The Court is advised that the defendant has filed a bankruptcy matter.
